CustomField.description: The MR calculation is based on the selected method: MAX applies the highest active Supplemental Rent Rate, SUM adds all active rates, and Single allows configuring multiple rates, enabling the applicable rate to be selected during utilization entry.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The MR calculation is based on the selected method: MAX applies the highest active Supplemental Rent Rate, SUM adds all active rates, and Single allows configuring multiple rates, enabling the applicable rate to be selected during utilization entry.
CustomField.label: _Rate Method
